seo_description.de: Familiengeführte Pizzeria in Manarola mit authentischen Holzofen-Pizzen. Frische lokale Zutaten, lockere Atmosphäre, gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis.
seo_description.en: Family-run pizzeria in Manarola serving authentic wood-fired pizzas. Fresh local ingredients, casual atmosphere, great value. Perfect for families.

seo_description.it: Pizzeria a conduzione familiare a Manarola che serve pizze autentiche cotte nel forno a legna. Ingredienti freschi locali, atmosfera informale.
